Package com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.sfsmodels.requests

package com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.sfsmodels.requests
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.sfsmodels
     
    com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.sfsmodels.data
     
    com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.sfsmodels.events
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    BoxActivateMonsterRequest
    Activates a monster, like a Wublin.
    BoxEggRequest
    Zaps an egg.
    BreedMonstersRequest
    Breeds two monsters with a breeding structure.
    BuyEggRequest
    Buys an egg from the market and starts incubating it in a nursery.
    BuyIslandRequest
    Buys an island.
    BuyStructureRequest
    Buys and places a structure.
    ChangeIslandRequest
    Changes the active island.
    ClearObstacleRequest
    Finishes clearing of an obstacle.
    CollectMineRequest
    Collects from a mine.
    CollectMonsterRequest
    Collects from a monster.
    DbBakeryFoodsRequest
    Queries the bakery recipe database.
    DbGenesRequest
    Queries the database of elements.
    DbMonstersRequest
    Queries the database of monster species.
    DbStructuresRequest
    Queries the database of structure types.
    FeedMonsterRequest
    Feeds a monster once.
    FinishBakingRequest
    Collects food from a bakery that has finished baking.
    FinishBreedingRequest
    For a breeding structure that has finished breeding, moves the egg to a nursery (not of the user's choice).
    FlipMonsterRequest
    Flips a monster.
    FlipStructureRequest
    Flips a structure.
    HatchEggRequest
    On islands that have nurseries, this hatches an egg that has finished incubating.
    LoginRequest
    The first request to be sent by the client to the server.
    MoveMonsterRequest
    Moves a monster and sets its volume.
    MoveStructureRequest
    Moves and scales a structure and sets its volume.
    MultiUpdateMonsterRequest
    Updates monster happiness.
    MuteMonsterRequest
    Mutes or unmutes a monster.
    NameMonsterRequest
    Names a monster.
    PlayerRequest
    Requests the user's player data.
    RequestFriendRequest
    Sends a friend request.
    SellEggRequest
    Sells an egg from a nursery.
    SellMonsterRequest
    Sells a monster.
    SellStructureRequest
    Sells a structure.
    StartBakingRequest
    Starts baking a recipe of choice in a bakery of choice.
    StartRemoveObstacleRequest
    Begins clearing of an obstacle (for a price).
    VisitFriendRequest
    Gets visit data for a user.
